records: IFLAG(1)=1 initializes; calls with IFLAG(1)=2 yield one (I,J,AIJ,INDCAT) entry; IFLAG(1)=3 terminates
entries may be supplied in convenient order; INDCAT 0 assigns and 1 accumulates; the built-in USRMT stream assigns, so a safe API would require deterministic duplicate policy
deferred before any Rust callback or matrix view is exposed
IFLAG(1)=1 initializes; calls with IFLAG(1)=2 yield one (I,J,AIJ,INDCAT) entry; IFLAG(1)=3 terminates
entries may be supplied in convenient order; INDCAT 0 assigns and 1 accumulates; the built-in DUSRMT stream assigns, so a safe API would require deterministic duplicate policy
deferred before any Rust callback or matrix view is exposed
